title: selaginella nummularia
intro: Selaginella nummularia, also known as Money Plant, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant's leaves have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and are also valued for their ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Selaginella nummularia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
